title: Progressive No Structures
description: This datapack allows you to make progress and even beat the game in worlds with Generate Structures disabled!
body:
## Do you miss that classic lonely feeling Minecraft used to give?

**Progressive No Structures** is a lightweight datapack that allows some items to spawn in Simple Dungeon chests (which still spawn with Generate Structures disabled) as well as allowing some structure specific mobs to spawn in other biomes. With this datapack, the game should now be completely beatable, and most blocks and items should be collectible.

## Simple Dungeons can now contain...
+ Music Disc - Creator (15%)
+ Music Disc - Creator (Music Box) (5%)
+ Music Disc - Precipice (15%)
+ Music Disc - Relic (15%)
+ Music Disc Fragment - 5 (5%)
+ Wayfinder Armor Trim (15%)
+ Raiser Armor Trim (15%)
+ Shaper Armor Trim (15%)
+ Host Armor Trim (15%)
+ End Portal Frame (20%)

## Piglin Bartering can now give...
+ Music Disc - Pigstep (5%)
+ Netherite Upgrade Smithing Template (3%)
+ Snout Armor Trim (10%)
+ Blaze Rod (20%)
+ Breeze Rod (20%)
+ Nether Wart (20%)

## These entities now drop...
**Blaze**:
+Rib Armor Trim Smithing Template (7.5%)

**Breeze**:
+Flow Armor Trim Smithing Template (7.5%)

**Copper Golem**:
+Bolt Armor Trim Smithing Template (7.5%)

**Drowned**:
+Coast Armor Trim Smithing Template (7.5%)

**Guardian**:
+Tide Armor Trim Smithing Template (7.5%),
+Wet Sponge (12.5%)

**Endermen**:
+Eye Armor Trim Smithing Template (7.5%)

**Husk**:
+Dune Armor Trim Smithing Template (7.5%)

**Phantom**:
+Broken Elytra (1.5%)

**Ravager**:
+Sentry Armor Trim Smithing Template (7.5%)

**Shulker**:
+Spire Armor Trim Smithing Template (7.5%)

**Vex**:
+Vex Armor Trim Smithing Template (7.5%)

**Warden**:
+Heavy Core (100%),
+Music Disc Fragment - 5 (100%),
+Ward Armor Trim Smithing Template (7.5%),
+Silence Armor Trim Smithing Template (2.5%)

**Witch**:
+Nether Wart (0-3),
+Wild Armor Trim Smithing Template (7.5%)

**Wither Skeleton**:
+Rib Armor Trim Smithing Template (7.5%)

## These entities now spawn in these biomes...
**Outter End Islands**:
+Shulker,
+Phantom

**Basalt Deltas**:
+Blaze

**Soul Sand Valley**:
+Breeze,
+Wither Skeleton

**Deep Oceans**:
+Guardian
